function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.hearthline_sensor_bundle
alias: hearthline_sensor_bundle
purchased_on: 2026-01-02
total_eur: 50
counterparty: Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH
project: Hearthline
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: Zigbee door sensors
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 18
    line_eur: 36
  - item: AAA rechargeable set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 14
    line_eur: 14
---
# Door and hallway sensor bundle

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                          |
| bill_id        | bill.hearthline_sensor_bundle |
| alias          | hearthline_sensor_bundle      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-01-02                    |
| total_eur      | 50                            |
| counterparty   | Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH     |
| project        | Hearthline                    |
| related_entity | Juniper                       |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                 | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | Zigbee door sensors  | 2   | 18       | 36       |
| 2 | AAA rechargeable set | 1   | 14       | 14       |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                |     |          | 50       |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Needed to test whether household events could be summarized without making the house feel creepy.

next_step.current_state: First of three bill files updated successfully with schema frontmatter and preserved body. Continue processing remaining listed files; ignore outbox-specific reactive hint because this write was not to outbox.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter to second bill file
Write frontmatter to third bill file
Delete inbox item and report completion
next_step.observation: Write to first Juniper-related bill file completed without tool error.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request successfully. I OCR-structured all three Juniper-related bill records by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving each original body verbatim, then removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read/context), read relevant nested AGENTS and required inbox/OCR/migration/schema workflows, processed exact preflight/inbox scope (3 files), preserved original bodies under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to OCR all bills related to Juniper. Canonical preflight listed exactly three related purchase files, all three were read and updated with required bill frontmatter fields per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, with body preserved per migration workflow; then inbox item was deleted per process-next and inbox rules.
